content.description:
Renders a hobson-instance item as a fully isolated nested Hobson environment inside an iframe.

## How It Works

1. Builds instance ID by chaining parent's instance ID with item ID
2. Creates iframe pointing to `bootstrap.html?instance=<id>`
3. The bootloader uses this instance ID as a storage prefix, creating isolated IndexedDB namespace
4. Nested kernel boots independently with its own items

## UI Elements

- Header bar showing instance name
- Reload button to refresh nested instance
- "Open in Tab" button to open in new browser tab
- Loading indicator during iframe load

## Use Cases

- Sandboxed kernel development/testing
- Multiple isolated workspaces
- Experimenting with kernel modifications safely
